'''âf-dh-n-ng''' ('''kafadhnengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:emasculate|emasculate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:emasculate|emasculate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-dh-n-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kafadhnengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadhnengoko|thifadhnengoko]] || [[word:jifadhnengoko|jifadhnengoko]] || [[word:shifadhnengoko|shifadhnengoko]] || [[word:kifadhnengoko|kifadhnengoko]]
|-

|-

|-
